name: quantumscan-forta-bot
description: Monitors Ethereum for quantum-vulnerable cryptography (ECDSA/ecrecover) in smart contracts. Powered by QuantumScan.io
longDescription: Detects smart contracts using quantum-vulnerable cryptographic patterns (ECDSA signature recovery via ecrecover, secp256k1 operations) that will be broken by sufficiently powerful quantum computers. Alerts on new contract deployments and monitors high-value DeFi protocols. Part of QuantumScan's blockchain PQC security ecosystem.
